prompt: A cherry blossom garden in full spring bloom. A stone path winds between rows of sakura trees with dense pink blossoms. Pink petals drift through the air. A large red torii gate stands ahead framing the path. A stone lantern sits on the left edge. People stroll in the background. Warm afternoon sunlight filters through the canopy. Beyond the torii gate, a small wooden shrine with a sloped roof and offering box is nestled among the cherry trees. A second stone lantern stands on the right side further along the path, and a wooden bench sits beneath a particularly large sakura tree past the gate. First-person viewer. First-person view with both hands holding a digital camera with a large rear LCD screen showing the live viewfinder image of the scene ahead.

tracking_object.desc: stone lantern on the left side of the path

scene_adherence.visible_part: A cherry blossom garden is in full spring bloom. A stone path winds between rows of sakura trees with dense pink blossoms. Pink petals drift through the air. A large red torii gate stands ahead framing the path. A stone lantern sits on the left edge. People stroll in the background. Warm afternoon sunlight filters through the canopy. Beyond the torii gate, a small wooden shrine with a sloped roof is nestled among the cherry trees.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: The small wooden shrine nestled among the cherry trees beyond the torii gate has an offering box. A second stone lantern stands on the right side further along the path. A wooden bench sits beneath a particularly large sakura tree past the gate.
